raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Tuksneſti / kur tu effi
redſeis / ka tas KUNGS taws
Deews teto neffis irr / ittin ka
weenâ Wihrs jawu Dehlu neſs/
us wiﬀeem Zetteem / kur tu gah-
jis effi / teekams juhs eſfat us
fcho Weetu nahkſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet zaur fcho Wahrdu
juhs ne tizzejat eekſch to KUNGU
juhsfu Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kaß juhsfu Preekſcha uß
Sa
to Zelfu ſtaigaja / iſlubkodams
jums to Weety/ kur jums bij ap-
mestees/ Nahti zaur ugguni/ rah-
didains jums to Zelfu / kas jums
bij jastatga / un Deena zaur Pa-
debbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tas KUNGS juh-
fu Wahrdu Balkfni dſirdeja/ tad
apſkaitahs wiꞥſch un ſwehreja/
fazzidains:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne weenamt no ſcheem
Wiheem / no ſcha niſna Augu-
ma / buhs to labbu Semmi re-
dſeht/ fo es ſwehrejs efuu winnu
Tehweem doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka ween Kahlebs Jewuna
Dehls / tam buhs to redſeht / un
tam dohſchn es to Semmi / us
fo wiꞥſch minnis irr / un winna
Behrneem / tapehz ka wiꞥſch pa-
ri: reisi tam KUNGAM klaufijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS arri pahr
rs, manni apſkaitahs juhfo deht/ un
fazztja : Ir tew ne buhs ue turren
nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Josuïß Nuuna Dehls/kas
tawa Preekſcha ſtahw/ tam buhs
us turren nahkt / ſtiprini winnu /
jo wiꞥſch iſdallihß Israeltam to
Ihpaſchumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhsfu Behrnizi / no ka
juhs fazztjat / tee buhs par Laupi-
jumu / un juhſcem Behrneem/
kas ſchodeen nedß labbu nedß tau-
nu ſinn / teem buhs us turren
nahkt / un teem dohſchu es to/ un
teem buhs to eemantoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet juhs atgreeseetees/ un
eita us to Tukſnibu pa tahß Nee-
dru-Juhraß Zelfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildejat juhs / un
fazzijat us man: Mehs eſtam prett
to KUNGU grehkojschi/ mehs zel-
junees us augſchu un kaxroſim
pehz wiſſu / fo tas KUNGS
muhfu Deews muins irr pa-
wehlejs. Kad nu ikweens no jums
ar ſaiveem Rihtkeem apbruunno-
juhs / un gattaws bija Kalnôß
zeltees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas KUNGS
us man : faeki winneem / ne eita
us augſchu/un ne kaxrojeet/ jo es
ne efinu juhsfu Widdu / ka juhs
ne tohpat juhsu Eenaidneeku
Preekſcha kauti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad es us jums run-
naju / tad juhs ne klautijat / un
turrejatees ta KUNGA Wahr-
dain pretti/ un mettatees pahr-
galwigi/ un zehlatees Kalnôß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad iggahje tee Amorite-
ri / kas tannis Kalnôß dſihwoja/
jums pretti / un dſinnahß jums
pakat/ ittin fa tahß Bittes dar-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
